prompt.content: Generate a letter template in new word document to parents of students who have been absent for more than 5 days in January. Include a placeholder for a physical signature, a placeholder for the student's name and number of absences, and reference the school's truancy policy. It should also include the current date (02/15/2025) and the Subject line: "AP US History Attendance Policy", salutation should be "To (Student's Full Name)'s Parent", Name: Mr Limas. The body should include the reason for the letter as the student's repeated absences in APUSH class, note that Arizona's Truancy Policy requires parents to first be notified by both a letter and a phone call, and reminder to please contact the school if the student is going to be absent for any legitimate reason (e.g., medical appointments, illnesses, etc.)
